evidence: "Murder, She Wrote is one of my favorite TV shows."
"Longmire's character has the same gritty approach to a sheriff's role as the Western I grew up watching in the '50's."
"The plot twists are unique and intriguing."
"The script leave clues that are interesting to follow and deduce the culprit."
"Too many series drag it out until you lose interest and stop watching."
"The second season is even more entertaining than the first."
"The quality of the DVD and delivery was excellent."
"The quality of the video plays well on my PC."
"The friction and attraction is well acted."
"The progression of Castle and Beckett's personal interest is delightful to watch."
"The detective's integrity is refreshing in these times of corruption."
"The interpersonal relationships between the characters are a good one."

summary: The user has a strong preference for mystery and western genres, appreciating complex narratives with unique plot twists. They value high production quality and emotional engagement, often enjoying character-driven stories that explore interpersonal relationships.
